description: Perform a manual endogeneity test (Control Function approach) for education in a wage equation using the 'mroz.gdt' dataset. Restrict the sample to working women (lfp=1). The test requires a first-stage OLS regression of 'educ' on 'const', 'exper', 'expersq', and 'motheduc' to produce residuals named 'v_hat'. These residuals must be included in a second-stage OLS regression of 'lwg' on 'const', 'educ', 'exper', 'expersq', and 'v_hat'. Save the complete output of this second-stage regression to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/endogeneity_test_results.txt. The significance of 'v_hat' in the second stage serves as the test for endogeneity.
